sql: SELECT b.BRANS_ADI, SUM(ft.VOP_TL) AS TOTAL_VOP FROM AS_DWH.FACT_POL_POLICE_TEM_ASSET ft INNER JOIN AS_DWH.POL_POLICE_OZET p ON ft.POLICE_ID = p.POLICE_ID AND ft.KAYNAK_SISTEM_ID = p.KAYNAK_SISTEM_ID INNER JOIN AS_DWH.GNL_TARIH t ON p.TANZIM_TARIH_ID = t.TARIH_ID INNER JOIN AS_DWH.POL_POLICE_REF_TANIM r ON ft.REF_ID = r.REF_ID INNER JOIN AS_DWH.POL_BRANS b ON r.BRANS_ID = b.BRANS_ID WHERE TO_CHAR(t.TARIH, 'YYYYMM') = '202512' GROUP BY b.BRANS_ADI ORDER BY TOTAL_VOP DESC FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY
rationale_short: Aggregates VOP by branch for December 2025 using valid joins and filters
risk_notes: Relies on correct join paths and assumes POL_BRANS has BRANS_ADI
description:
Question answered: Selects top 10 branches by VOP for December 2025.
Tables used: FACT_POL_POLICE_TEM_ASSET, POL_POLICE_OZET, GNL_TARIH, POL_POLICE_REF_TANIM, POL_BRANS.
Filters: Filters data for period '202512' using TARIH.
Grouping/measures: Groups by BRANS_ADI and sums VOP_TL.
Expected output columns: BRANS_ADI, TOTAL_VOP.
Assumptions: Assumes BRANS_ADI is available in POL_BRANS and joins are valid.

sql: SELECT b.BRANS_ADI, SUM(ft.VOP_TL) AS TOTAL_VOP FROM AS_DWH.FACT_POL_POLICE_TEM_ASSET ft INNER JOIN AS_DWH.POL_POLICE_OZET p ON ft.POLICE_ID = p.POLICE_ID AND ft.KAYNAK_SISTEM_ID = p.KAYNAK_SISTEM_ID INNER JOIN AS_DWH.GNL_TARIH t ON p.TANZIM_TARIH_ID = t.TARIH_ID INNER JOIN AS_DWH.POL_POLICE_REF_TANIM r ON ft.REF_ID = r.REF_ID INNER JOIN AS_DWH.POL_BRANS b ON r.BRANS_ID = b.BRANS_ID WHERE TO_CHAR(t.TARIH, 'YYYY') = '2025' GROUP BY b.BRANS_ADI ORDER BY TOTAL_VOP DESC FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY
rationale_short: Aggregates annual VOP by branch for 2025 using valid joins and filters
risk_notes: Relies on correct join paths and assumes POL_BRANS has BRANS_ADI
description:
Question answered: Selects top 10 branches by VOP for the entire year of 2025.
Tables used: FACT_POL_POLICE_TEM_ASSET, POL_POLICE_OZET, GNL_TARIH, POL_POLICE_REF_TANIM, POL_BRANS.
Filters: Filters data for year '2025' using TARIH.
Grouping/measures: Groups by BRANS_ADI and sums VOP_TL.
Expected output columns: BRANS_ADI, TOTAL_VOP.
Assumptions: Assumes BRANS_ADI is available in POL_BRANS and joins are valid.

sql: SELECT b.BRANS_ADI, SUM(ft.VOP_TL) AS TOTAL_VOP FROM AS_DWH.FACT_POL_POLICE_TEM_ASSET ft INNER JOIN AS_DWH.POL_POLICE_OZET p ON ft.POLICE_ID = p.POLICE_ID AND ft.KAYNAK_SISTEM_ID = p.KAYNAK_SISTEM_ID INNER JOIN AS_DWH.GNL_TARIH t ON p.TANZIM_TARIH_ID = t.TARIH_ID INNER JOIN AS_DWH.POL_POLICE_REF_TANIM r ON ft.REF_ID = r.REF_ID INNER JOIN AS_DWH.POL_BRANS b ON r.BRANS_ID = b.BRANS_ID WHERE t.TARIH BETWEEN TO_DATE('2025-01-01','YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE('2025-12-31','YYYY-MM-DD') GROUP BY b.BRANS_ADI ORDER BY TOTAL_VOP DESC FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY
rationale_short: Aggregates VOP by branch for full year 2025 using valid joins and filters
risk_notes: Relies on correct join paths and assumes POL_BRANS has BRANS_ADI
description:
Question answered: Selects top 10 branches by VOP for the entire year of 2025.
Tables used: FACT_POL_POLICE_TEM_ASSET, POL_POLICE_OZET, GNL_TARIH, POL_POLICE_REF_TANIM, POL_BRANS.
Filters: Filters data between '2025-01-01' and '2025-12-31' using TARIH.
Grouping/measures: Groups by BRANS_ADI and sums VOP_TL.
Expected output columns: BRANS_ADI, TOTAL_VOP.
Assumptions: Assumes BRANS_ADI is available in POL_BRANS and joins are valid.
